summary: Fixed all three critical issues. (1) PKCE S256: generatePKCE() is now async; it uses crypto.subtle.digest('SHA-256') on the TextEncoder-encoded verifier, then base64url-encodes the 32-byte digest per RFC 7636. The raw-verifier-as-challenge bug is gone. startOAuthFlow() awaits the async helper. (2) Duplicate event cursors: the two independent createEffect loops (lastTeamBridgeIdx and lastProcessedEventIdx) were merged into a single createEffect with one shared cursor (lastEventIdx). Each event is now visited exactly once per reactive update; both the team-bridge dispatch and the UI signal updates (thinking, token_usage, approval_request, question_request, plan_created) happen in the same loop iteration. (3) Duplicate run/stream: rustAgent.stream was removed from rust-bridge.ts. A clarifying comment documents that all agent execution is inherently streaming via the Tauri 'agent-event' channel; run() returns only the final session summary. No callers of rustAgent.stream existed in the codebase.
